title: Gli sbandati
writer: Eriprando Visconti, Francesco Maselli, Ageo Savioli
actors: Lucia Bosè, Isa Miranda, Jean-Pierre Mocky
plot: In the summer of 1943 Countess Luisa and her son Andrea left Milan to escape the bombings and retreated to their country villa, where they host two of Andrea's contemporaries, cousin Carlo, son of a fascist hierarch who fled to Sw...
